programme.title: Christmas Wreaths and Ribbons
programme.desc: A woman receives help from a neighbor when an injury puts her holiday wreath deliveries in jeopardy.

programme.title: A Kindhearted Christmas
programme.desc: Jaime tries to anonymously give gifts to those in need while pursuing a new romance.

programme.title: A Christmas Less Traveled
programme.desc: A woman embarks on a holiday journey to retrace her family's most memorable moments.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy Donaldson struggles with her mom's shadow, Muriel, the Christmas darling of Icicle Falls.

programme.title: The Art of Christmas
programme.desc: Struggling artist Liv James accepts a teaching job at a local elementary school to make ends meet.

programme.title: Christmas Wreaths and Ribbons
programme.desc: A woman receives help from a neighbor when an injury puts her holiday wreath deliveries in jeopardy.

programme.title: A Kindhearted Christmas
programme.desc: Jaime tries to anonymously give gifts to those in need while pursuing a new romance.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy Donaldson struggles with her mom's shadow, Muriel, the Christmas darling of Icicle Falls.

programme.title: A Royal Date for Christmas
programme.desc: A European Duke arrives in the US, he realizes that his bags have been lost in transit.

programme.title: Our Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Roles reverse as Nicole's boss plans newly engaged Nicole and Michael's Christmas wedding.

programme.title: A Christmas… Present
programme.desc: Maggie Larson is determined to give her brother and niece the best Christmas possible.

programme.title: Aisle Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Two exes finally reconnect when a snowstorm leaves them stranded in a superstore.

programme.title: Much Ado About Christmas
programme.desc: When the truth comes out, it puts a budding Christmas romance at risk.

programme.title: A Royal Date for Christmas
programme.desc: A European Duke arrives in the US, he realizes that his bags have been lost in transit.

programme.title: Our Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Roles reverse as Nicole's boss plans newly engaged Nicole and Michael's Christmas wedding.

programme.desc: Maggie Larson is determined to give her brother and niece the best Christmas possible.

programme.desc: Two exes finally reconnect when a snowstorm leaves them stranded in a superstore.

programme.title: A Royal Date for Christmas
programme.desc: A European Duke arrives in the US, he realizes that his bags have been lost in transit.

programme.title: Our Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Roles reverse as Nicole's boss plans newly engaged Nicole and Michael's Christmas wedding.

programme.title: Romantic Rewrite
programme.desc: Ivy is a talented romance book editor who helps a stubborn mystery writer incorporate romance.

programme.title: Journey to Christmas
programme.desc: A winter storm forces a fashion model to spend the week before Christmas with her chauffeur.

programme.title: Angel Falls Christmas
programme.desc: A devoted doctor with little time for the Christmas spirit is in desperate need of an intervention.

programme.title: The Love Subscription
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a businesswoman and the founder of a gift box subscription service.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Ballet
programme.desc: A retired ballerina finds unexpected romance while staging a performance of "The Nutcracker."

programme.title: A Little Women's Christmas
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of "Little Women," following the lives and loves of the March sisters.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor investigates the mysterious murder of a renowned yarn maker.

programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: A professional matchmaker finds that she has unexpectedly fallen for one of her clients.

programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: A professional matchmaker finds that she has unexpectedly fallen for one of her clients.

programme.title: 48 Christmas Wishes
programme.desc: Two junior elves misplace a town's letters to Santa and set out to retrieve the missing wishes.
